description: Style NoteThese adidas Yorgio sports sandals in brown, will serve you perfectly when you're out on an all-terrain camp. They'll Fit well, stay on, and keep you dry and comfortable.Product DetailsSynthetic straps on the forefoot, collar and ankle, with velcro fastners for the forefoot and ankle straps to attain a snug fitPadded inner lining for the straps for greater comfortPrinted logo on the forefoot and ankle strapCushioned footbed with slightly elevated triangle and bee hive pattern for a soft massage feel and all-day comfortTPR all-terrain outsole with multi-directional lugs for durability, grip and tractionFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetCurved midfoot for ergonomic comfortMaterial and CareSynthetic, rubberRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
